title: AGAPA - Sunseeker Predator 84
description:
AGAPA is an elegant 26-meter Sunseeker Predator 84 motor yacht available for charter in the Mediterranean, including France, Italy and Monaco. Built in 2009 and recently refitted in 2024, she combines sporty performance with contemporary luxury, making her an excellent choice for guests seeking both style and comfort at sea.

Accommodating up to 9 guests in stylish cabins, AGAPA features spacious outdoor areas perfect for relaxing under the Mediterranean sun. Guests can enjoy generous sun pads, a large swim platform and a selection of water toys, ideal for making the most of the region’s crystal-clear waters.

Whether cruising along the French Riviera, the Italian coastline or the glamorous waters of Monaco, AGAPA offers an exceptional charter experience that blends speed, comfort and the iconic performance of the Sunseeker Predator series.
